docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO SERVICE FEE INDICATED) SERVED JUL-21-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RIES, KIM
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT. MATTER CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 19, 2021 AT 10:00 A.M.. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF MICHELLE DIEDERICH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KIM REIS IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT STATES TO THE COURT THAT ALL TERMS OF THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT OF AUG-17-2021 HAVE BEEN MET. CASE IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK:CLERKS: W. TRUPEK/ATESH DATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,860.00 FILED BY DIEDERICHS, MICHELE AS TO DEFENDANT RIES, KIM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-17-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-17-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO OCT-19-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MICHELE DIEDERICHS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KIM RIES IS PRESENT. MICK JOHNSON TESTIFIES ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PARTIES AGREE THAT DEFENDANT IS TO REMOVE ANY ATTACHMENTS AND FIXTURES TO PLAINTIFF'S PROPERTY. PLAINTIFF WILL ABSORB ANY COSTS FOR DAMAGES TO PLAINTIFF'S PROPERTY. DEFENDANT IS TO PROVIDE ACCESS TO PLAINTIFF TO ALLOW INSPECTION OF PLAINTIFF'S PROPERTY. PARTIES ARE TO WORK WITH EACH OTHER TO DETERMINE WHO WILL HAVE THE GATE REMOVED. APPEARANCES ARE REQUIRED AT THE OCTOBER 19, 2021 HEARING TO PROVIDE THE COURT WITH A STATUS UPDATE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED.
